message:
test(core,cli): add mock-free unit tests for prompts and CLI lib modules (bd-9ygk, bd-2bpq)

Core prompts module (3 files, 129 tests):
- schema.test.ts: Zod schema validation for all prompt fields
- bundles.test.ts: Bundle data integrity, lookups, SKILL.md generation
- workflows.test.ts: Workflow data integrity, step validation, cross-refs

CLI lib modules (4 files, 72 tests):
- variables.test.ts: Variable parsing, file reading, value processing
- utils.test.ts: Safe paths, skill ID validation, atomic writes
- clipboard.test.ts: Clipboard interface behavior
- auto-update.test.ts: Update check interface and version info

All tests use real data and filesystem - zero mocks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
